vision.tagline: We're discovering the Green Road together.
vision.subhead: Explore practical alternatives for everyday life.
vision.positioning: Trusted curator of sustainable living systems — field guide, not judge

strategicEvolution.shift: From possible product-scoring concept to trusted curator of sustainable living systems
actLike: system-builder for better homes and routines
strategicEvolution.contentStrategy: Ecosystem guides first; products are supporting evidence, not the main story

rules.gold: trim / buttons / reward — not body text on pearl or olive

nonNegotiable: no gold body text on pearl or olive
no scores ratings certified or approved badge language

nextPriority.name: Mobile calm and readability polish
scope: slightly increase tiny mobile text where readability suffers
improve spacing between featured discovery orbit hint Discovery Context Continue Exploring and command search
make command search useful but less visually loud
constraints: no glow changes unless explicitly asked
no Stripe email backend or new pages
no scores ratings or badge language
